title: Support - Device page Go button
scenario: "Go" button on Device Support page opens Poly Contact Support in browser after tapping a paired device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) to open the navigation drawer.
3. Tap Support to open the Support section.
4. Tap Device to view the list of paired Poly devices.
5. From the list of paired devices, tap on a specific device to view its details.
6. On the Device Details page, verify the following information is displayed: Device Name, Product ID, Serial Number, Software Version, Headset Revision, Last Connected.
7. Tap the Go button located on the Device Details page.
expected: Tapping the "Go" button opens the Poly Contact Support page in the device's default web browser.
